example: I made an appointment with the manager.
exampleTranslation: 我和經理預約了見面。

example: The meeting room is available this afternoon.
exampleTranslation: 會議室今天下午可以使用。

example: Please confirm your reservation by email.
exampleTranslation: 請透過電子郵件確認您的預約。

example: Customers can purchase tickets online.
exampleTranslation: 顧客可以在線上購買票券。

example: She works in the marketing department.
exampleTranslation: 她在行銷部門工作。

example: The deadline for the report is Friday.
exampleTranslation: 報告的截止日期是星期五。

example: Every employee must attend the training.
exampleTranslation: 每位員工都必須參加訓練。

example: The company purchased new office equipment.
exampleTranslation: 公司購買了新的辦公設備。

example: We have a dinner reservation for seven.
exampleTranslation: 我們預約了七點的晚餐座位。

example: Please submit the application before Friday.
exampleTranslation: 請在星期五以前提交申請。

example: The machines must be maintained regularly.
exampleTranslation: 這些機器必須定期保養。

example: The two companies negotiated a new contract.
exampleTranslation: 兩家公司協商了一份新合約。

example: More than fifty employees participated in the event.
exampleTranslation: 超過五十名員工參加了活動。

example: The company changed its vacation policy.
exampleTranslation: 公司修改了休假規定。

example: The meeting was postponed until next week.
exampleTranslation: 會議被延後到下星期。

example: I recommend taking the morning flight.
exampleTranslation: 我建議搭乘早上的班機。

example: The interview is scheduled for Monday.
exampleTranslation: 面試安排在星期一。

example: The store is temporarily closed for repairs.
exampleTranslation: 商店因維修而暫時關閉。

example: Travel expenses will be paid by the company.
exampleTranslation: 旅行費用將由公司支付。

example: Sales increased significantly last month.
exampleTranslation: 上個月的銷售額大幅增加。

example: The advertisement appeared in several magazines.
exampleTranslation: 這則廣告刊登在數本雜誌中。

example: Each applicant must submit a résumé.
exampleTranslation: 每位申請人都必須提交履歷。

example: We received your job application.
exampleTranslation: 我們已收到你的求職申請。

example: The manager approved the budget.
exampleTranslation: 經理核准了預算。

example: We arranged a meeting for Thursday.
exampleTranslation: 我們安排星期四開會。

example: The flight's arrival was delayed.
exampleTranslation: 班機抵達時間延誤了。

example: Please finish the assignment by noon.
exampleTranslation: 請在中午前完成任務。

example: All staff members must attend the seminar.
exampleTranslation: 所有員工都必須參加研討會。

example: Only managers are authorized to sign the form.
exampleTranslation: 只有經理被授權簽署表格。

example: Employees receive several health benefits.
exampleTranslation: 員工享有多項健康福利。

example: The bank opened a new branch downtown.
exampleTranslation: 銀行在市中心開設新分行。

example: The company interviewed five candidates.
exampleTranslation: 公司面試了五位應徵者。

example: The hotel responded quickly to the complaint.
exampleTranslation: 飯店很快回應了這項申訴。

example: The conference will begin at nine.
exampleTranslation: 研討會將在九點開始。

example: Both parties signed the contract.
exampleTranslation: 雙方簽署了合約。

example: The new location is convenient for customers.
exampleTranslation: 新地點對顧客來說很方便。

example: Customer satisfaction is our top priority.
exampleTranslation: 顧客滿意度是我們的首要目標。

example: The package will be delivered tomorrow.
exampleTranslation: 包裹將於明天送達。

example: Members receive a ten-percent discount.
exampleTranslation: 會員可享九折優惠。

example: Please attach the required documents.
exampleTranslation: 請附上必要文件。

example: The new system is more efficient.
exampleTranslation: 新系統更有效率。

example: The repair estimate was higher than expected.
exampleTranslation: 維修估價比預期高。

example: The company upgraded its production facility.
exampleTranslation: 公司升級了生產設施。

example: We appreciate your feedback.
exampleTranslation: 我們感謝您的意見。

example: The store checks its inventory every week.
exampleTranslation: 商店每週檢查庫存。

example: The invoice is attached to this email.
exampleTranslation: 發票已附在這封電子郵件中。

example: The manufacturer offers a one-year warranty.
exampleTranslation: 製造商提供一年保固。

example: All merchandise is on sale this weekend.
exampleTranslation: 所有商品本週末都在特價。

example: We will notify you when the order is ready.
exampleTranslation: 訂單準備好時我們會通知你。

example: The company operates three factories.
exampleTranslation: 公司營運三座工廠。

example: Payment is due within thirty days.
exampleTranslation: 款項必須在三十天內付清。

example: She applied for a sales position.
exampleTranslation: 她應徵了一個銷售職位。

example: The new software improved productivity.
exampleTranslation: 新軟體提升了生產力。

example: He received a promotion last month.
exampleTranslation: 他上個月獲得升遷。

example: Customers may request a full refund.
exampleTranslation: 顧客可以申請全額退款。

example: The lobby will be renovated next month.
exampleTranslation: 大廳將在下個月整修。

example: We need to replace the broken printer.
exampleTranslation: 我們需要更換故障的印表機。

example: Experience is a requirement for this job.
exampleTranslation: 經驗是這份工作的必要條件。

example: The shipment arrived ahead of schedule.
exampleTranslation: 貨物比預定時間提早抵達。

example: We found a new supplier for office paper.
exampleTranslation: 我們找到新的辦公紙供應商。

example: Please complete the customer survey.
exampleTranslation: 請完成顧客問卷。

example: This laptop comes with a two-year warranty.
exampleTranslation: 這台筆電附有兩年保固。

example: The products are stored in a warehouse.
exampleTranslation: 產品存放在倉庫中。

example: The annual report will be published in June.
exampleTranslation: 年度報告將於六月公布。

example: The project is within budget.
exampleTranslation: 這項專案在預算範圍內。

example: The airline canceled the flight.
exampleTranslation: 航空公司取消了班機。

example: The hall has a capacity of 500 people.
exampleTranslation: 禮堂可容納五百人。

example: The consultant met with a new client.
exampleTranslation: 顧問與新客戶見面。

example: The company offers competitive salaries.
exampleTranslation: 公司提供有競爭力的薪資。

example: Bad weather caused a delay.
exampleTranslation: 惡劣天氣造成延誤。

example: The departure time has changed.
exampleTranslation: 出發時間已經更改。

example: The company distributes products nationwide.
exampleTranslation: 公司在全國配送產品。

example: Full-time workers are eligible for benefits.
exampleTranslation: 全職員工符合福利資格。

example: Supervisors evaluate employee performance annually.
exampleTranslation: 主管每年評估員工表現。

example: The museum will exhibit modern art.
exampleTranslation: 博物館將展出現代藝術。

example: The deadline has been extended by one week.
exampleTranslation: 截止日期延長了一週。

example: Frequent travelers can earn bonus points.
exampleTranslation: 經常旅行的人可以累積獎勵點數。

example: The building passed the safety inspection.
exampleTranslation: 這棟建築通過安全檢查。

example: A technician will install the equipment.
exampleTranslation: 技術人員將安裝設備。

example: The company will launch a new product.
exampleTranslation: 公司將推出新產品。

example: The hotel has a convenient location.
exampleTranslation: 飯店的位置很方便。

example: Annual membership costs fifty dollars.
exampleTranslation: 年度會員費為五十美元。

example: Our main objective is to increase sales.
exampleTranslation: 我們的主要目標是提高銷售額。

example: Please pay the outstanding balance.
exampleTranslation: 請支付尚未繳清的餘額。

example: A parking permit is required.
exampleTranslation: 停車需要許可證。

example: Follow the safety procedure carefully.
exampleTranslation: 請仔細遵守安全程序。

example: The board reviewed the proposal.
exampleTranslation: 董事會審查了提案。

example: The company plans to recruit more engineers.
exampleTranslation: 公司計畫招募更多工程師。

example: Please register before the seminar.
exampleTranslation: 請在研討會前完成註冊。

example: The company will reimburse travel expenses.
exampleTranslation: 公司將報銷旅行費用。

example: A sales representative will contact you.
exampleTranslation: 業務代表會與您聯絡。

example: The company's revenue increased this year.
exampleTranslation: 公司的營收今年增加了。

example: We need a new marketing strategy.
exampleTranslation: 我們需要新的行銷策略。

example: Ask your supervisor for approval.
exampleTranslation: 請向主管取得核准。

example: She was transferred to another branch.
exampleTranslation: 她被調到另一間分公司。

example: The venue can hold 800 guests.
exampleTranslation: 場地可容納八百位賓客。

example: You can withdraw cash from this machine.
exampleTranslation: 你可以從這台機器提款。

example: The hotel can accommodate 300 guests.
exampleTranslation: 這間飯店可容納三百位房客。

example: The agenda was sent to all participants.
exampleTranslation: 議程已寄給所有參與者。

example: The manager allocated funds to the project.
exampleTranslation: 經理將資金分配給專案。

example: The contract was amended yesterday.
exampleTranslation: 合約昨天已經修訂。

example: We anticipate higher demand this summer.
exampleTranslation: 我們預期今年夏天需求會增加。

example: Please contact us if you need assistance.
exampleTranslation: 需要協助時請聯絡我們。

example: I attached the report to the email.
exampleTranslation: 我把報告附在電子郵件中。

example: The company conducts an annual audit.
exampleTranslation: 公司每年進行審計。

example: The position offers competitive compensation.
exampleTranslation: 這個職位提供有競爭力的薪酬。

example: Written consent is required.
exampleTranslation: 需要書面同意。

example: Please consult your supervisor first.
exampleTranslation: 請先諮詢你的主管。

example: The trainer demonstrated how to use the device.
exampleTranslation: 講師示範如何使用裝置。

example: Tokyo is our final destination.
exampleTranslation: 東京是我們的最終目的地。

example: This material is light and durable.
exampleTranslation: 這種材料輕且耐用。

example: Please enclose a copy of your receipt.
exampleTranslation: 請附上收據副本。

example: The sales forecast looks positive.
exampleTranslation: 銷售預測看起來很樂觀。

example: The company implemented a new policy.
exampleTranslation: 公司實施了新政策。

example: Several customers inquired about the product.
exampleTranslation: 幾位顧客詢問了這項產品。

example: Attendance is mandatory for all employees.
exampleTranslation: 所有員工都必須出席。

example: The hotel has a high occupancy rate.
exampleTranslation: 這間飯店的入住率很高。

example: Smoking is prohibited in this area.
exampleTranslation: 此區域禁止吸菸。

example: The supplier sent us a price quote.
exampleTranslation: 供應商寄給我們一份報價。

example: The office will relocate next year.
exampleTranslation: 辦公室明年將搬遷。

example: The company wants to retain skilled workers.
exampleTranslation: 公司希望留住熟練員工。

example: The product meets all safety specifications.
exampleTranslation: 產品符合所有安全規格。

example: Your subscription will expire next month.
exampleTranslation: 你的訂閱將於下個月到期。

example: There are two vacancies in the accounting department.
exampleTranslation: 會計部門有兩個職缺。

meaning: 資淺的.地位較低的.晚輩的
檔案.提出申請/提出訴訟
極討厭的.糟透的.可怕的

example: The new branch is adjacent to the station.
exampleTranslation: 新分公司位於車站旁邊。

example: Please check the availability of the meeting room.
exampleTranslation: 請確認會議室是否可用。

example: Many employees commute by train.
exampleTranslation: 許多員工搭火車通勤。

example: The company offers comprehensive health benefits.
exampleTranslation: 公司提供完整的健康福利。

example: Sales rose for three consecutive months.
exampleTranslation: 銷售額連續三個月上升。

example: Defective products will be replaced.
exampleTranslation: 瑕疵商品將予以更換。

example: The supplier must fulfill the order by Friday.
exampleTranslation: 供應商必須在星期五前完成訂單。

example: Smoking is prohibited on company premises.
exampleTranslation: 公司場所內禁止吸菸。

example: A material shortage delayed production.
exampleTranslation: 材料短缺導致生產延誤。

example: We have sufficient funds for the project.
exampleTranslation: 我們有足夠的資金完成專案。

example: Please verify your contact information.
exampleTranslation: 請確認你的聯絡資訊。
